title: Show HN: We indexed 40,000 AI agents across GitHub, npm, PyPI, HuggingFace, and MCP
content:
Tired of searching 5 different registries to find the right AI agent? We indexed 40,000+ agents from GitHub, npm, PyPI, HuggingFace, and MCP servers into one searchable platform.

Instead of checking:
• GitHub for repositories
• npm for JavaScript packages  
• PyPI for Python packages
• HuggingFace for models
• Various MCP registries for servers

You describe what you need: "customer support automation" or "document analysis with OCR" and get ranked results across all platforms.

Key features:
• 40,000+ agents indexed, 23,000+ actively maintained
• Quality scoring based on maintenance, adoption, stability
• Cross-protocol support: LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, MCP, A2A
• Semantic search that understands capabilities vs keywords
• Developer APIs and packages for integration

Try it: https://agentcrawl.dev
API: https://api.agentcrawl.dev/docs

We're not another MCP registry — we're protocol-agnostic agent discovery. Think "Google for AI agents" rather than "yet another catalog."

What's your biggest pain point with agent discovery? Are you also tired of hunting across multiple platforms?

strategic_updates.positioning: Cross-platform agent discovery engine (NOT MCP registry)
strategic_updates.value_prop: Search 1 platform instead of 5 different registries
strategic_updates.call_to_action: What's your biggest agent discovery pain point?

messaging_framework.primary: Google for AI agents across all platforms
messaging_framework.solution: One search, all platforms, quality-ranked results

expected_impact.competitive_advantage: Positions us as category-different, not competitor
